action.prompt: GATE CHECK: Verify that requirements.md exists in this same spec folder. If it does NOT exist, show ERROR: 'requirements.md must be created before design.md. Run the requirements-analyst power first.' Do NOT proceed with design generation.
GATE CHECK: Verify that design.md exists in this same spec folder. If it does NOT exist, show ERROR: 'design.md must be created before tasks.md. Run the solution-designer power first.'

QA GATE: Check that specs/ contains a test-plan.md for this feature. If missing: ERROR 'Test plan required before merge'. If exists, check it contains 'QA Sign-off: APPROVED'. If not signed off: ERROR 'QA sign-off required before merge'.
